Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class SamlSsoConfig

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SamlSsoConfig
public class SamlSsoConfig extends SObject

Java class for SamlSsoConfig complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="SamlSsoConfig">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="AttributeFormat" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AttributeName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Audience" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DeveloperName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ErrorUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ExecutionUser" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ExecutionUserId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IdentityLocation" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IdentityMapping" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Issuer" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Language" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LoginUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LogoutUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MasterLabel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NamespacePrefix" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OptionsRequireMfaSaml" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OptionsSpInitBinding" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OptionsUseConfigRequestMethod" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OptionsUseSameDigestAlgoForSigning" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OptionsUserProvisioning" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RequestSignatureMethod" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SamlJitHandler" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ApexClass" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SamlJitHandlerId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SingleLogoutBinding" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SingleLogoutUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ValidationCert" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Version" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

      public void setVersion(String value)
      Sets the value of the version property.
      Parameters:
      value - allowed object is String
